subject: Add demo helper scripts
commit_message:
Add demo helper scripts

Add script to preload VF module data with heat env file
Add script to add complex object only
Add script to add customer only
Add script to associate a customer with cloud region

Change-Id: I78cec27a313f304ac12c4380c029490d84d61d43
Issue-ID: INT-540
Signed-off-by: Bin Yang <bin.yang@windriver.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Code-Review-2

Hi bin, the demo.robot was really more of a hack to help support some quick demos in the early release. it might be better to put different flows in the demo/scripts (https://gerrit.onap.org/r/gitweb?p=demo.git;a=tree;f=scripts;hb=refs/heads/master) location.

Patch Set 1:

> Hi bin, the demo.robot was really more of a hack to help support
 > some quick demos in the early release. it might be better to put
 > different flows in the demo/scripts (https://gerrit.onap.org/r/gitweb?p=demo.git;a=tree;f=scripts;hb=refs/heads/master)
 > location.

Hi Daniel, I believe you are talking about demo.sh, while this patch is related to robot scripts, not shell script. I don't understand how your suggestion will be realized, could you elaborate that? Thanks

Abandoned

No updates for too long.
